title: Calling all artists! Doodle for a cause at Green Shed this weekend
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Wilderness Art Association...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Wilderness Art Association (WAA) invites everyone to a relaxed and creative morning of doodling at the Green Shed Coffee Roastery in Wilderness on Saturday 26 April from 10:00.


> This fun-filled event forms part of the association’s Night of 1 000 Drawings charity drive in support of the Seven Passes Initiative.


The Seven Passes Initiative is a local NPO dedicated to the upliftment and development of rural communities such as Touwsranten and Wilderness Heights.

Night of 1 000 Drawings is an annual fundraising effort that culminates in a vibrant art event on 10 October, forming part of the much-anticipated 2025 Wilderness Arts Festival.

So bring your art supplies, A5 paper or canvas, and some creativity to join the fun. There are no costs involved and no experience needed!

Every doodle counts toward a good cause.

Doodles from a previous event at Hoeka Toeka in Hoekwil. Photo: Supplied

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
